info.description: OpenAPI projection of the food pillar's REST contract. Authored as a ts-rest contract (src/contract/rest.ts); consumed directly by polyglot clients and via openapi-typescript by TS consumers.
info.title: @pops/food

get.summary: List aliases (optionally filtered by search / source / target)

post.summary: Re-point several aliases onto a single canonical target

get.summary: List aliases joined with their resolved target metadata

post.summary: FIFO-ordered batches for the consume/override picker

get.summary: Get a batch with resolved variant / ingredient / source

patch.summary: Edit a batch (expiry / notes / prep state)

post.summary: Adjust a batch quantity (spoiled / wasted / correction)
Move a batch to another location

get.summary: Resolve a quantity to its canonical unit
List unit conversions

delete.summary: Delete a unit conversion (seeded rows are protected)

get.summary: List ingredient weights

delete.summary: Delete an ingredient weight (seeded rows are protected)

get.summary: Recipes that reference the batch’s variant (FIFO cook suggestions)

post.summary: Fridge/pantry view grouped by location → ingredient → batch

get.summary: Distinct error codes across failed ingests
Unfiltered pending-draft queue depth
Per-draft inspector view (source + draft aggregate)

post.summary: Restore a rejected draft back to draft

get.summary: List an ingredient's tags
Ingredients carrying a given tag
Distinct tags with usage counts (optionally namespace-scoped)
List ingredients (optionally filtered by search / parent)

post.summary: Rename an ingredient slug (updates the slug registry)

get.summary: Get an ingredient (by numeric id or slug) with its variants

delete.summary: Delete an ingredient; returns blockers when variants/aliases remain

get.summary: FK-backed delete blockers (variants + aliases counts)
Recipes referencing this ingredient via compiled lines
List prep states

post.summary: Promote a compiled draft to current

get.summary: List proposed slugs surfaced by a draft’s compile

post.summary: Restore an archived/published version as a new draft

get.summary: Get a recipe version assembled for rendering
List a recipe’s draft versions

post.summary: Fork a new draft from a recipe’s current version

get.summary: Search the slug registry by substring, optionally scoped by kind

post.summary: Rank cookable recipes by substitution count given current inventory

get.summary: List substitutions (raw FK ids)
Node/edge projection of the substitution graph
List substitutions widened with slug + display name per endpoint
Per-line substitution candidates with batch coverage
